hypothesis: A conformer-aware extension to multimodal contrastive pretraining that jointly aligns SMILES with 3D electron-density grids across multiple low-energy conformers of the same molecule will yield representations that are invariant to both rotation and conformational changes, and will improve accuracy in predicting conformer-energy differences (ΔE_conf) and conformer-dependent properties compared to single-conformer, rotation-only training.
